To calculate your Gross Margin Percentage, use this formula:
((Selling Price - Cost) / Selling Price) × 100
Using your example from earlier ($30 cost and $50 price):
(($50 - $30) / $50) × 100 = 40%
I have analyzed your store's products and ranked them by which ones need margin optimization the most.
